items.name_en: 🆕 25c handle bowling bag In stock❤️
items.name_cn:
🆕 25c handle bowling bag In stock❤️
Very soft lambskin material, excellent touch. Super soft and smooth to the touch🥰 even the chain handle is soft. Structured and not saggy, the leather has a matte finish🖤
Generous capacity, fits large phones📱 perfectly and Pro Max is also completely fine!! Plenty of space left, the weight is still very light after packing😎
Great for hand carry or crossbody/shoulder, very stylish🤩
A keyword to summarize it is: light and chic!
5300~
size:19×14×7cm

Size: 34×36×12cm

items.name_en: Size: 16*26*9cm. CHANEL Overseas Channel Stock 19 Series Goatskin Flap Bag. The CHANEL 19 bag is the last design Karl Lagerfeld participated in before his passing. It features enlarged classic quilting and a chain strap design, retaining the classic while upgrading practicality and comfort! The name '19' comes from time, just like the 2.55, so you know it was born in 2019. It also covers Coco Chanel's birthday. Imported goatskin, fine and soft texture, feels fluffy when held.
items.name_cn: Size: 16*26*9cm. CHANEL Overseas Channel Stock 19 Series Goatskin Flap Bag. The CHANEL 19 bag is the last design Karl Lagerfeld participated in before his passing. It features enlarged classic quilting and a chain strap design, retaining the classic while upgrading practicality and comfort! The name '19' comes from time, just like the 2.55, so you know it was born in 2019. It also covers Coco Chanel's birthday. Imported goatskin, fine and soft texture, feels fluffy when held.
